description: LaunchDarkly feature-flag evaluation calls embed the recorded user context (base64 in the URL) — user-specific, cacheable, and irrelevant to business-flow correctness.
llmFlowNotes: LaunchDarkly /sdk/evalx/ calls carry the recorded user's context in the URL; they are feature-flag lookups, safe to disable. /sdk/goals and /events/diagnostic are lightweight and may stay enabled.
